---
title: An example project
format: 
    pdf: default
    ipynb: default
jupyter: python3
---

[Download notebook](notebooks/10_example_project.ipynb).



Human population data

When loading data from external files (e.g. CSV), you may encounter encoding issues — especially with non-ASCII characters such as German umlauts or accented letters. See @sec-encoding for an overview of encodings and how to handle them in Python.
